name: lugo-vscode
description: A high-performance, zero-allocation Lua 5.4 parser and Language Server (LSP).

lugo.workspace.libraryPaths.markdownDescription: List of absolute paths to external Lua libraries to index.

lugo.workspace.ignoreGlobs.markdownDescription: List of globs/files to ignore during indexing. Inherits VS Code's `files.exclude` automatically.

lugo.environment.knownGlobals.markdownDescription: List of global variables to ignore when reporting undefined globals. Supports globs like `love.*`.

lugo.parser.maxErrors.markdownDescription: Maximum number of syntax errors to report per file. Set to `0` for unlimited. Reduces cascade noise on heavily broken files.

lugo.diagnostics.undefinedGlobals.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for undefined global variables. Ignores variables listed in `#lugo.environment.knownGlobals#`.

lugo.diagnostics.implicitGlobals.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for implicit global variable creation (e.g., forgetting the `local` keyword inside a function).

lugo.diagnostics.shadowing.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics when a local variable shadows a global or outer local.

lugo.diagnostics.unreachableCode.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for unreachable code (e.g., statements strictly following a `return` or `break`).

lugo.diagnostics.ambiguousReturns.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for ambiguous returns where an expression on the next line is accidentally evaluated as the return value.

lugo.diagnostics.deprecated.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for usage of symbols marked with `@deprecated`.

lugo.diagnostics.unused.local.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for unused local variables.

lugo.diagnostics.unused.function.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for unused local functions.

lugo.diagnostics.unused.parameter.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for unused function parameters (and varargs).

lugo.diagnostics.unused.loopVar.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for unused loop variables.

lugo.diagnostics.duplicateField.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics for duplicate fields inside table literals.

lugo.diagnostics.unbalancedAssignment.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics when assigning fewer or more values than variables.

lugo.diagnostics.duplicateLocal.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics when a local variable is defined twice in the exact same scope.

lugo.diagnostics.selfAssignment.markdownDescription: Enable diagnostics when assigning a variable to itself.

lugo.diagnostics.emptyBlock.markdownDescription: Enable hints for empty blocks (e.g., `do end`).

lugo.diagnostics.typeCheck.markdownDescription: Enable strict type checking for definitely-invalid operations (calling numbers, indexing nil, etc.). **Warning:** Lua is highly dynamic; this will produce false positives unless your codebase uses comprehensive LuaCATS `@type` annotations.

lugo.inlayHints.parameterNames.markdownDescription: Enable inline parameter name hints for function and method calls.

lugo.inlayHints.suppressWhenArgumentMatc.markdownDescription: Suppress parameter name hints when the argument name exactly matches the parameter name (e.g., avoiding `pSource: pSource`).

lugo.inlayHints.implicitSelf.markdownDescription: Enable inline `self` hints for method definitions using the colon syntax.

lugo.features.documentHighlight.markdownDescription: Enable document highlights for variables and function/method calls.

lugo.features.hoverEvaluation.markdownDescription: Evaluate and display the result of constant expressions on hover (e.g., `1 + 2` suggests `3`).

lugo.features.codeLens.markdownDescription: Enable CodeLens annotations (e.g., reference counts) above function definitions.

lugo.features.formatting.markdownDescription: Enable the built-in Lua formatter for inline format fixing and document formatting.

lugo.features.formatOpinionated.markdownDescription: Apply opinionated formatting tweaks (e.g., forcing blank lines between unrelated statements, before returns).
